steps.screen:
[23CIt is written in the Book of Tyr:

[27CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[27Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[27CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[27Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[27Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[27CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[23CYour god Tyr seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[23Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.
 lqqqqq~qqqqk
 x~~~~~~~~[36m([39m~x[10CYou, a newly trained Stripling, have been heralded
 x~~~~~~~~~~~[10Cfrom birth as the instrument of Tyr.  You are destined
 x~~~~~~~~~~x[10Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
 x~~~~~~~~~~x[10Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
 x~[97mf@[39m~~~~~~~x[10Cof us all:  Go bravely with Tyr!
 mqqqqqqqqqqj[10C--More--
